_meta.title: QA verdict — Wave 4 initial review (Gate-normalized partition)
_meta.scope: Chicagoland / Illinois only. Boston / Massachusetts parked.
_meta.mode: review-only; no DB writes; consolidation FROZEN; gate ceiling = ready_for_validation

verdict_rationale: The Gate-normalized partition is internally consistent, reconciles exactly (146 placements = 146 partitioned, 145 distinct + 1 intentional cross-lane duplicate), and every disposition is sound under the net stricter-wins bar. All 19 net-new merge_eligible rows are genuinely absent from the current 310 and each carries durable, transcribed on-disk documentary evidence: the 17 dentist_multi (T3) rows on their own-brand locators with named owner + no MSO (correctly NOT DSO/PE), and the 2 branded_dso (T5) rows on DSO-OWN exact-address locators with established brand + MSO/platform structure and correctly-orthogonal pe_backed. The 3 corroborates rows are genuinely in the 310 at a matching tier (add nothing). The 3 qa_attention rows are correctly flagged-not-counted. No systemic Phase-C defect was found. PASS_WITH_HOLDS (not PASS) because three carry-forward holds attach to pre-existing 310 rows and one documentation gap attaches to the two T5 rows; none is a MUST_FIX because nothing in the Wave-4 net-new set is wrong on merit and consolidation stays frozen (ceiling = ready_for_validation; nothing merges).
must_fix_note: No MUST_FIX. No Main AO / Fleet B re-do is required to accept this partition. The holds below are validation-step conditions on already-existing rows + a documentation tidy-up, not corrections to Wave-4 net-new placements.
systemic_defect_note: No systemic Phase-C defect. Lane-3 evidence rows reviewed carry transcribed source URLs; the two T5 promotions rest on the DSO's OWN exact-address locator (gold-standard AB2/AB3); the Gate correctly OVERRODE the one agent 'ready' that failed AB3/AH3 (Sonrisa/CDCA FQHC). Per the autonomous protocol step 7, this finding does NOT block the Gate from writing AUTH_FLEETB_PHASEC_51_100 — but that remains the Gate's call, and Fleet B output would itself require a fresh QA pass.

intentional_cross_lane_duplicate.verdict: ACCEPTED — both touches land in the same hold bucket; 2 rows, 1 distinct location; flagged in partition _meta; no count effect.

holds_carried_forward.name: PRO DENTAL IL - CHAD WISE PC
holds_carried_forward.issue: AB7 closure unresolved. The Wave-4 Lane-3 agent reported operating_status=closed_or_relocated, but no fresh closure re-scan with a transcribed source was provided.
holds_carried_forward.ab9_finding: AB9 SATISFIED for 310 PRESENCE — the canonical manifest explicitly released ao:LABINOV_BORIS (ao_network_release_decisions.decisions['ao:LABINOV_BORIS']: decision=release_eligible, rows_total=7, rows_released=7, network_evidence_quality=verified, tier=branded_dso, pe_backed=true). So this row is NOT an unauthorized protected-network promotion. HOWEVER the manifest's own stale_closed_notes flags 4 of 7 LABINOV members as confirmed via shared P.C. shell + AO + corporate mailing only (no individual locator URL): Berwyn 60402, Chicago 60617, Chicago 60652, Chicago 60660.
holds_carried_forward.recommendation: Before this row remains in any eventual VALIDATED floor, the Gate should obtain an operating-status re-scan with a transcribed source. If confirmed closed/relocated, exclude (AB7) even though the network is released. This is a Wave-3 carryover condition, NOT a Wave-4 merge blocker. QA cannot mutate the 310.

holds_carried_forward.name: AFFORDABLE DENTURES & IMPLANTS (Downers Grove P.C.; Illinois PLLC)
holds_carried_forward.issue: Specialist/tooth-replacement scope rows already present in the 310 as branded_dso via name_chain. Per user default #2, Affordable is held out of the GP floor as a scope question.
holds_carried_forward.recommendation: Requires a USER GP-scope policy decision (specialist vs GP-floor inclusion). Conservative default while user is away = hold out of GP floor. The Gate correctly flagged for QA rather than silently retaining. Wave-3 carryover; NOT a Wave-4 merge blocker.

holds_carried_forward.name: T5 branded_dso net-new (Midwest Dental West Dundee; Dental Dreams Cicero)
holds_carried_forward.issue: DOCUMENTATION/normalization only: the top-level dso_structure_rationale field is null on both rows; the actual DSO=STRUCTURE rationale + exact-address proof lives in evidence.exact_address_match and evidence.parent_mso_platform_evidence. The output contract names dso_structure_rationale as the required field for any T4/T5.
holds_carried_forward.recommendation: Before the Gate builds any evidence-only addendum-candidate file, promote evidence.exact_address_match + evidence.parent_mso_platform_evidence into the top-level dso_structure_rationale field so the merge-ready row satisfies the output contract literally. Substance is fully present and verified; this is tidy-up, not a merit defect.

zero_write_proof.attestation: FROZEN — intact. No DB write, no manifest mutation, no ready-file mutation, no LEDGER/PROGRESS mutation, no tier/classification-column write, no prior-QA edit. consolidate_census.py --allow-db-write NOT run.

consolidate_authorization.note: This PASS_WITH_HOLDS accepts the Gate-normalized partition for review purposes only. It does NOT authorize merging into the canonical manifest, does NOT authorize ownership_tier writes, and does NOT authorize consolidation. Per protocol: on PASS/PASS_WITH_HOLDS the Gate MAY prepare an evidence-only addendum-candidate file but MUST NOT merge it into the canonical manifest absent explicit later user approval.
